name: E-8 standardized rule metadata: type values outside {problem, suggestion, layout} are rejected per the §2.1 enum
command: printf 'id: g-ts-302\ntype: bug\n' > g-ts-302.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/rule-metadata-complete.sh" g-ts-302.yaml 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 2 ] && grep -q 'type: "bug" not in enum {problem, suggestion, layout}' err.txt && echo enum_enforced 1>&2
